title: Keeheen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Keeheen.jpg]] |name=Keeheen |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]]''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Reddish-orange]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Trianii Rangers]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Solo-Captain? Come, I will aid you. We have but seconds."
"Why?"
"Because my mate, Atuarre, said not to bother coming back without you, and because my cub, Pakka, would have come if I had not.|Keeheen and Han Solo|}} '''Keeheen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] who served in the elite [[Trianii Rangers]] on the frontier of [[Trianii Space/Legends|Trianii Space]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The youngest fully commissioned Ranger in the history of the organization, Keeheen patrolled the frontier [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fibuli]], a world long contested between the Trianii and the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Keeheen fought as part of an armed Trianii resistance against an Authority [[Annexation of Fibuli|annexation]] of Fibuli—for his efforts, he was captured and sent to the secret Authority [[Prison/Legends|prison]] known as [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]]. However, his wife [[Atuarre]] and cub [[Pakka]] helped to track him down and, along with infamous [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], freed Keeheen and the other prisoners in a massive [[Liberation of Stars' End|jailbreak]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|The Trianii had settled on the fringes of Authority space generations before the Corporate Sector was chartered. When the Authority finally annexed the Trianii colony world recently, they met with resistance. Atuarre's mate disappeared and her cub was taken from her and placed in Authority custody.|[[Rekkon]]|}} A [[Gender/Legends|male]] of the feline [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] [[Species/Legends|race]], Keeheen was orphaned at an early age, when his parents were [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] on their farm by a toxic dumping. The cub was taken in by his aunt, and grew up dreaming of joining the [[Trianii Rangers]], the elite law enforcement troops that defended the [[Trianii Space/Legends|Trianii colonies]] he called home. Keeheen began training in preparation for his future career from an early age, and after a childhood where he excelled in both athletics and academics, he became the youngest fully commissioned Trianii Ranger in history. Not long after, he met the love of his life, when he introduced himself to a young Trianii woman named [[Atuarre]] who had caught his [[Eye/Legends|eye]] while she was watching Ranger training. Keeheen proposed [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]] on the spot, and while she turned him down, they exchanged contact information and stayed in touch over the next two [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Keeheen continued to propose frequently, and eventually, Atuarre accepted and the two were wed.''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' [[File:TrianiiFamily.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Keeheen reunites with his family after escaping Stars' End.]] Keeheen and Atuarre welcomed their first cub, a boy named [[Pakka]], soon after. At Keeheen's urging, Atuarre even joined the Rangers herself, finding that her background in dance prepared her brilliantly for training in the Trianii martial arts. Together, they were assigned to the frontier world of [[Fibuli]], a flashpoint in the long-running conflict between the Trianii and the neighboring [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. Although the early days of their patrol on Fibuli were relatively uneventful—the pair mostly spent their time busting [[thionarx]] dealers and [[herdbeast]] rustlers—that all changed in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], when the Corporate Sector Authority moved in force to [[Annexation of Fibuli|annex]] Fibuli. Keeheen and his wife immediately took up arms as part of the local Trianii resistance, but they were overwhelmed in a matter of months, and both Keeheen and his cub were captured. Over the coming weeks, Keeheen was [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] relentlessly, but refused to give up the names of the resistance's ringleaders. Ultimately, while Atuarre managed to rescue Pakka in a daring raid on an Authority [[Transport/Legends|transport]], Keeheen became one of many around the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] to seemingly vanish into thin air. Unbeknownst to his family, Keeheen, along with hundreds of other [[Prison/Legends|prisoners]], were secretly shipped to a experimental prison facility known as [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]], located on the desolate [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Mytus VII/Legends|Mytus VII]]. There, he was placed in a [[stasis booth]] to ride out his prison sentence in a dreamless sleep. However, his family had not forgotten him: Atuarre and Pakka joined a group of friends and family of the recently disappeared of the Corporate Sector, in order to find and free Keeheen and the other prisoners. Over the coming [[Standard month|months]], they managed to uncover the existence and location of Stars' End, and along with infamous [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], staged a [[Liberation of Stars' End|jailbreak]]. The invaders forced a massive power plant failure which freed the prisoners from stasis, and in the rush to escape, Keeheen joyously reunited with his wife and cub. However, Solo had become separated from the rest of the group, and Keeheen—fearing that his cub would volunteer if he didn't—joined up with several others to go back for him. Keeheen fought his way through [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] troops and caught up with Solo in the smoking corridors of the prison, and together made their way off the station in Solo's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''. In the months after the liberation of Stars' End, Keeheen and Atuarre decided to settle down, taking a year off from active duty to give their traumatized cub a chance to heal. Keeheen went on to take a role as a Ranger [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]], while his wife became a trainer for the force's [[Cadet/Legends|cadets]]. ==Personality and traits== In a sense, Keeheen's direction in life was determined early on, with the death of his parents due to an "accidental" toxic dumping. The image of a Trianii Ranger standing up against those responsible stuck with him throughout his life and shaped his strong sense of justice, and from that moment on he dreamed of becoming a Ranger himself, to being what he saw as the only people in the Trianii colonies who stood for something. Keeheen dedicated himself completely to his dream, only to fall in love along the way: the sleek and graceful Atuarre captivated him, leading the open and forthright Trianii Ranger to propose at the first opportunity. Ultimately, it was Atuarre who rescued him from his imprisonment on Stars' End, and Keeheen was overjoyed to see his family united again, feeling incredible relief in knowing that his family was safe. ==Behind the scenes== Keeheen first appeared in ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1979]], and was pictured by [[Alfredo Alcala]] in the story's [[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|comic adaptation]].[[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'' comic]] Keeheen was later illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]] in [[1993]]'s ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'', which provided much of the Trianii's backstory. ==Appearances== *''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}} *[[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'' comic]] ==Sources== *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'' *''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{CSWECite|II|205|Keeheen}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Keeheen |pl=Keeheen }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Trianii]]
